name: proplab-workspace
description: Zero-config component lab — discover components, generate props, preview live

scripts.build: npm run build -w @proplab/core && npm run build -w @proplab/web && npm run build -w @proplab/server && npm run build -w proplab
scripts.demo: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js --project examples/demo-ui --no-open
scripts.demo:hard: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js --project examples/hard-cases --no-open
scripts.demo:expo: npm run build && node packages/cli/dist/index.js --project examples/expo-ui --no-open
scripts.publish:packages: npm run build && npm publish -w @proplab/core && npm publish -w @proplab/server && npm publish -w proplab
